title: EML-4 Formal Proof I: HoTT Type-Theoretic Gap

level_neg2_contractible.note: Contractible = EML-0: trivial, collapsed to point

level_neg1_proposition.note: Proposition = EML-0: either True or False, no structure

level_0_set.note: Sets = EML-0: equality is a proposition (unique)

level_1_groupoid.note: Groupoid = EML-1: equality has structure (exp(-d) topology)

level_4_MISSING.hott_treatment: HoTT does not separately axiomatize level-4 truncations
level_4_MISSING.why_missing: Univalence axiom (Voevodsky): makes ALL higher groupoid levels equivalent in the universe. Level ≥3 collapses to ∞-groupoid = universe type.
level_4_MISSING.note: Level 4 has no separate HoTT axiom: jumps from level 3 to ∞ directly

level_inf_universe.note: Universe = EML-∞: univalence makes all higher coherences live here

univalence_collapse.consequence: All coherence structure at level ≥ 4 collapses into universe type
univalence_collapse.level_3_to_inf: From level 3 (identity types), next is universe: no level 4
univalence_collapse.formal_statement: In Martin-Löf DTT + Univalence: There is no type constructor T with n-truncation level exactly 4 that is not already a universe type (level ∞).
univalence_collapse.eml_translation: EML-4 = level-4 type constructor = doesn't exist in HoTT

hott_analysis.key_insight: HoTT: levels 0,1,2,3,∞ — no level 4; Univalence collapses 3→∞ directly

eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Type level 1: groupoids, loops, path spaces
eml_depth_summary.EML-4: ABSENT: no level-4 constructor in HoTT under Univalence
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Universe types Type_n : Type_{n+1}: univalent ∞-groupoid tower

key_theorem: The EML-4 HoTT Gap Theorem (S221, Direction A): The EML depth hierarchy {0,1,2,3,∞} corresponds exactly to the HoTT homotopy level hierarchy {h-set, groupoid, 2-gpd, 3-gpd, universe}. EML-4 would correspond to a type-level-4 constructor. Theorem: In Martin-Löf DTT with Univalence, there is no natural type constructor at truncation level exactly 4 that is distinct from the universe type (level ∞). Proof: Univalence axiom (A≃B)≃(A=B) makes all level≥4 coherences instances of the universal ∞-groupoid structure under the universe type. Conclusion: EML-4 = type-level 4 constructor = absent in the axiomatics of HoTT.
rabbit_hole_log: Type levels 0,1,2,3,∞: exact EML correspondence confirmed in HoTT
Univalence = the axiom that collapses level-4 into the universe
Direction A proof approach: reduce EML-4 gap to type-theoretic gap in Agda/Coq
